output.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?shogunate ?shogunateLabel ?battle ?battleLabel WHERE {
  ?shogunate wdt:P31 wd:Q172327 ; wdt:P1076 ?battle .
  ?battle wdt:P31 wd:Q322249 .
  ?shogunate rdfs:label ?shogunateLabel .
  ?battle rdfs:label ?battleLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?shogunateLabel) = 'en')
  .
  FILTER(LANG(?battleLabel) = 'en')
}
output.answer: The Kamakura Shogunate fell after the Battle of Hakusūkī (Q5970375), the Ashikaga Shogunate fell after the Battle of Sekigahara (Q289345), and the Tokugawa Shogunate fell after the Battle of Toba–Fushimi (Q489382).
